title: Hellay's Overhualed Creepers X Fresh Animations
description: Makes the Hellay's Overhualed Creepers compatible with Fresh Animatios
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b73bd75a637d34f9d753b6a81cfcb8047f4e55c0.png)
# **About**
#### **A simple resource pack that makes creepers in [Fresh Animations](<https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations>) look like [Hellay's Overhauled Creepers](<https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/hellays-overhualed-creepers>)**

## **FAQ**

-  ### **What does this pack do?**
   **This pack changes the creeper's texture in [Fresh Animations](<https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations>)**
-  ### **What versions does it support?**
   **it almost supports avery version that [Fresh Animations](<https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations>) supports but the game will say it's for newer versions if you use 1.20 or below**
- ### **Does it require any additional mods or resource packs?**
   **yes, obviously you need [Fresh Animations](<https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations>) and the mods [Fresh Animations](<https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations>) requires**
- ### **How can I use the pack?**
   **First install this pack and Fresh Animations then put [Fresh Animations](<https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations>) under this pack and you're done!**
- ### **Where can I report any issues that I have?**
   **You can communicate with me and report bugs and issues in the [discord server](<https://discord.gg/fmS6pf2EZN>)**
- ### **Can I modify this pack?**
  **Yes , if it's for personal use feel free to change anything you want.But if you want to publish the modified pack or put my pack in a modpack or show it in a video pls mantion my name , put a link to my pack or let me know in my discord**
